title: Welcome
text:
Profile Picture





I’m Prasansha Ojha, a Data Analyst and Business Analyst dedicated to transforming raw data into actionable business insights through advanced analytics and strategic data visualization.


I specialize in end-to-end data analytics—from data engineering and ETL pipelines to exploratory analysis, statistical testing, and interactive dashboard creation. I combine technical expertise with business acumen to drive data-informed decision-making.




Transforming complex datasets into insights




Building robust ETL pipelines and data infrastructure




Creating compelling Power BI dashboards







Explore some of my recent work and learn about the challenges I’ve tackled.
Browse All Projects →




Interested in collaborating or want to learn more? I’d love to hear from you!
Contact Me →

title: About Me
text:
Hi! I’m Prasansha Ojha, a Data Analyst and Business Analyst with a strong foundation in both technical data engineering and strategic business analysis. I’m passionate about uncovering hidden patterns in data and translating them into actionable business strategies. I believe in the power of data-driven decision making to solve real-world business challenges.



I started my career at WorldLink Communication Ltd. as a Data Analyst Intern, where I quickly progressed to a full Data Analyst role. During my tenure, I worked extensively with SQL Server, PostgreSQL, Oracle, and Python to build robust data pipelines and dashboards. I’ve successfully migrated legacy systems, optimized performance, and created critical business dashboards that support revenue and operational decisions.
Currently, I’m a Data Analytics Analyst at Cedargate Technology, where I continue to apply my skills in data analysis, visualization, and business intelligence.



BSc in Computer Science and Information Technology - Tribhuvan University, Kathmandu, Nepal (June 2025)




Data Analytics Analyst 1 at Cedargate Technology (February 2026 - Present)
Data Analyst at WorldLink Communication Ltd. (December 2024 - February 2026) - Contributed to ARPU, Customer Benefit Impact, and Customer Renewal Performance dashboards - Migrated queries and datasets from Oracle to PostgreSQL with query optimization - Wrote Python scripts for MongoDB-to-SQL Server data insertion - Built and optimized the EMT Daily KPI Dashboard for revenue, churn, growth, and regional metrics - Implemented data verification and validation checks across multiple sources
Data Analyst Intern at WorldLink Communication Ltd. (June 2024 - December 2024) - Developed dashboards for FTTH ports, network distribution, and bandwidth usage - Created and improved SQL procedures for task automation - Collaborated with teams on network data integration and analysis




I’m driven by curiosity and a commitment to excellence. I believe in:

Problem-Solving: Understanding the core of a challenge before diving into solutions
Continuous Learning: Staying updated with emerging technologies and best practices
Collaboration: Working effectively with teams to achieve shared goals
Quality: Delivering reliable, maintainable, and user-friendly solutions




Beyond coding, I enjoy [your interests/hobbies]. These experiences help me bring diverse perspectives to my work.



I’m always excited to explore new opportunities and collaborate on meaningful projects. Whether you have a project in mind or just want to chat about technology, feel free to reach out!
Get in Touch →

title: Projects
text:
A collection of projects that showcase my skills, creativity, and passion for building meaningful solutions.






Description: End-to-end data science project focused on analyzing digital screen usage patterns and predicting eye strain risk using exploratory data analysis, statistical insights, and machine learning techniques. The project aims to identify key behavioral and lifestyle factors contributing to eye fatigue and provide actionable recommendations for healthier screen habits.
Technologies: Python (Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Scikit-learn, SHAP), Jupyter Notebook, Power BI
Key Features:

Performed dataset overview, data cleaning, and exploratory data analysis to identify trends, distributions, and outliers
Visualized average daily screen time across different age groups and analyzed eye strain risk based on screen exposure
Investigated relationships between screen time, sleep patterns, and eye strain indicators through statistical visualizations
Planning to implement feature engineering techniques to derive custom eye strain risk metrics and behavioral indicators
Planning to build machine learning models for predicting eye strain risk levels based on user lifestyle and device usage patterns
Planning to develop interactive dashboards and visual reports for communicating insights and personalized recommendations
Planning to apply model explainability techniques to identify the most influential factors contributing to eye strain

Date: present | Context: Personal Project




Description: An end-to-end data analytics project that consolidates multi-source vendor data into actionable business intelligence for performance evaluation and optimization.
Technologies: SQL, Python (Pandas, NumPy, SciPy), Power BI
Key Features: - Designed SQL CTEs to consolidate 6+ raw datasets (purchases, sales, pricing, invoices, inventory) - Performed data cleaning and feature engineering in Python - Created critical KPIs: Gross Profit, Profit Margin, Stock Turnover, Sales-to-Purchase Ratio - Conducted EDA with statistical tests (t-tests, distributions, correlations) - Developed interactive Power BI dashboards for vendor performance visualization
Date: October 2025 | Context: Personal Project








Description: Automated data pipeline to extract, process, and visualize ISP market share data, enabling trend analysis and competitive intelligence.
Technologies: Python (BeautifulSoup, Requests, pdfplumber), SQL Server, Power BI
Key Features: - Developed Python-based automation pipeline for data extraction - Used BeautifulSoup and Requests to retrieve published PDF reports - Extracted and processed tabular data from PDFs using pdfplumber - Cleaned and stored data in SQL Server - Built Power BI dashboards to visualize market trends and performance insights
Date: February 2025 | Context: Office Project at WorldLink Communication Ltd.




Description: A web application that recommends blogs to users by combining content-based and collaborative filtering techniques with machine learning.
Technologies: Python, Django, Machine Learning, SQL
Key Features: - Implemented content-based and collaborative filtering algorithms - Handled algorithm design and backend development - Integrated machine learning models with Django framework - Enhanced accuracy by combining user interaction data with content similarity measures - Delivered a functional recommendation engine for improved user engagement
Date: August 2024 | Context: College Project







I enjoy contributing to open-source and sharing my projects with the community.

Screen Time and Eye Strain Analysis
Vendor Performance Data Analytics
ISP Market Share Data Scraping
